summary: Full end-to-end authentication flow testing for Hönsgården app. All flows tested and verified working: Registration with email verification, Login, Forgot Password (code-based), Logout. Backend APIs and frontend UI integration both fully functional.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Registration flow: POST /api/auth/register correctly requires name, accepted_terms, validates password length >=6
✅ Email verification: 6-digit code stored in pending_registrations, sent via Resend, verified via /api/auth/verify-registration
✅ Login: POST /api/auth/login validates credentials, returns user data, sets session cookie
✅ Forgot Password: POST /api/auth/forgot-password sends 6-digit code, /api/auth/verify-reset-code validates, /api/auth/reset-password-with-code completes reset
✅ Logout: POST /api/auth/logout properly invalidates session, /api/auth/me returns 401 after logout
✅ Security: Forgot password doesn't reveal if email exists (always returns 200), verification codes expire in 15 minutes
seed_data_creation: Created test user 'test-user-1772199665@test.honsgarden.se' through full registration flow with email verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full authentication flow verified working. Test user created and can be used for further testing. Email verification codes can be retrieved from MongoDB pending_registrations collection for testing. Password reset codes stored in password_resets collection.

Registration_API.details: Returns requires_verification:true, sends 6-digit code via Resend

Registration_Validation.details: Validates: name required, accepted_terms required, password >= 6 chars, duplicate email rejected

Email_Verification.details: Validates 6-digit code, creates user account, sets session cookie

Resend_Verification.details: Generates and sends new verification code

Login_API.details: Validates credentials, returns user data with session

Session_Check.details: Returns user data when authenticated, 401 when not

Forgot_Password.details: Sends 6-digit reset code, doesn't reveal if email exists

Verify_Reset_Code.details: Validates code, returns temporary token for password reset

Frontend_Welcome_Screen.details: Shows Hönsgården branding, feature grid, 'Kom igång gratis' and 'Logga in' buttons

Frontend_Registration_Form.details: Name, Email, Password fields with GDPR consent checkboxes present

Frontend_Login_Form.details: Email, Password fields with 'Glömt lösenord?' link

Frontend_Forgot_Password.details: Email input with 'Skicka kod' button, shows verification code entry after submit

Frontend_Login_Success.details: After login, redirects to main app dashboard with tabs

email_integration.note: Verification codes sent successfully. For testing, codes can be retrieved from MongoDB.

screenshots_captured: auth_test_register_form.png - Registration form with GDPR checkboxes
auth_test_login_success.png - Main app dashboard after login
